description: The frozen optimal stack. One winner per layer. Changes require explicit justification and eval evidence.

L1-telephony.reason: Maximum maturity, outbound routing, compliance controls, SIP trunking, programmable voice. Best ecosystem for production voice at scale.

L2-stt.reason: Best-in-class latency for real-time streaming, stable WER, strong API for voice agents, direct integration with Twilio and WebRTC.

L3-llm.reason: Best base for real-time conversation, function calling, memory, multi-turn reasoning and controlled handoff. Realtime API eliminates STT/TTS round-trip.

L4-tts.reason: Best perceived naturalness and human-like voice quality for commercial outbound calls. Strong API and voice cloning support.

L5-orchestration.reason: Vapi for fast flow and flexibility; Retell for phone automation depth. Combined they cover rapid iteration and production robustness.

L6-integration.reason: HubSpot covers SMB/commercial speed; Salesforce covers enterprise depth. Together they provide complete CRM coverage.

L7-analytics-qa.reason: Proprietary evaluation layer with traces, golden calls, human review, scorecards and regression suite. No single vendor covers all quality dimensions needed.

L12-domain-vertical.reason: Thoughtly for sales, Clara for recruiting, Vozy for qualification. Vertical layer is selected per use case, not globally.
